bead.title: Stage 1.6: rewrite FEAT-008-web-ui.md (full rewrite)
bead.description: Full rewrite of docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md. Web UI feature spec now targets GraphQL operation names and Svelte page contracts. Every page lists its GraphQL query/subscription by name. Test plan section references Playwright against the SvelteKit build. Zero React references. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #6.
bead.acceptance: (1) `grep -iE 'react|vite|tanstack|minisearch' docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md` returns ZERO matches. (2) Every page description names its GraphQL query. (3) Test plan section names Playwright and Vitest, not MSW.
